com.societegenerale.failover.core.report.FailoverReporter

Package
Description
com.societegenerale.failover.configuration
Spring Boot auto-configuration for the failover framework.
com.societegenerale.failover.core.report
Reporting and metrics publication for the failover lifecycle.

  • Uses of FailoverReporter in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FailoverReporter
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.failoverReporter(CompositeReportPublisher reportPublisher, FailoverScanner failoverScanner, FailoverClock clock, ManifestInfoExtractor manifestInfoExtractor, FailoverExpiryExtractor failoverExpiryExtractor, FailoverProperties failoverProperties)
    Creates the failover reporter bean that publishes a startup summary.

  • Uses of FailoverReporter in com.societegenerale.failover.core.report

    Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.core.report that implement FailoverReporter
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    DefaultFailoverReporter
    Default FailoverReporter that scans for all @Failover-annotated methods and publishes a startup summary metric for each one.
